orchestrator.notes: Attempt 2 complete: QA APPROVED WITH RESERVATIONS; Security ADVISORY with no critical findings

scaffold.notes: Tauri 2 + React + Vite + Python sidecar, cargo check + tsc clean

bento_layout.notes: CSS grid, context panel + 2x2 agent grid + user terminal

pty_bridge.notes: Read/write path wired in Rust + React hook; not end-to-end with real agents

launch_sequence.notes: Attempt 1 succeeded: TCP 7374 ingest + bootstrap_harness + store diff merge; QA approved with reservations; Security ADVISORY

pty_sidecar_pipe.notes: Multiplex TCP 127.0.0.1:7374 per framing in server.py/pty.rs accepted by QA and Security with localhost DoS hardening advisories

security_hardening.notes: Attempt 1 succeeded: PTY ingest limits/timeouts/connection cap/UTF-8 handling plus TCP_NODELAY and applyDiff new-agent fix; QA approved; Security ADVISORY

security_hardening_polish.notes: Non-blocking follow-up: total per-frame deadline, clearer connection tracking, explicit complete-agent diff contract, optional buffer scan optimization

live_e2e_smoke.notes: Attempt 1 succeeded with reservations: backend/protocol smoke passed; QA approved with reservations; Security ADVISORY; GUI/xterm live verification remains follow-up

gui_xterm_live_verification.notes: Attempt 2 succeeded with reservations: useShallow/capability/async guards accepted; 4 panes, PTY output, signal-to-UI verified; keyboard PTY E2E blocked by invalid harness.toml commands; Security ADVISORY

agent_command_configuration.notes: Replace invalid claude --agent X commands in harness.toml with valid long-running shells or real agent invocations so keyboard-to-PTY E2E can be verified

user_terminal_ux.notes: Decide whether UserTerminal should spawn a shell, stay hidden, or be explicitly presented as inactive

tauri_capability_narrowing.notes: core:default is accepted for trusted local main window; narrow to explicit event/invoke permissions if remote or less-trusted webviews are added

signal_protocol_alignment.notes: AGENTS.md optional-signal examples permit separate lines, but harness/parser.py only captures optionals on same line as STATUS

dev_setup_docs.notes: Document harness/.venv setup for Homebrew Python PEP 668 and stale Vite port 1420 cleanup

pty_resize.notes: Call fitAddon.fit() + Tauri resize on pane dimension change

token_bars.notes: ContextPanel renders from store; needs live data

status_dots.notes: Driven by agent.status in store; needs live signals
